## DaprCommandStatusStore Class

DAPR state store implementation of [ICommandStatusStore](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Commands.ICommandStatusStore.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Commands\.ICommandStatusStore')\.
Status writes are advisory per enforcement rule \#12 — failures are logged but never thrown\.

## DaprCommandStatusStore\.ReadStatusAsync\(string, string, CancellationToken\) Method
